case_title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PATRICIA LYNN HOLT TRUST
cause_of_action: TRUST (application for determination that petition for order (1) instructing co trustees to grant access to real property to beneficiary alan w. holt,)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PETITIONER HOLT, ALAN S

ORDER AFTER HEARING ON APPLICATION FOR DETERMINATION THAT "PETITION FOR ORDER (1) INSTRUCTING CO-TRUSTEES TO GRANT ACCESS TO REAL PROPERTY TO BENEFICIARY ALAN W. HOLT, (2) TO MAKE AN IMMEDIATE PRO-RATA DISTRIBUTION TO BENEFICIARY ALAN W. HOLT OF ONE-THIRD OF THE NON-EXEMPT TRUST ASSETS, (3) TO DISTRIBUTE REAL PROPERTY TO BENEFICIARY ALAN W. HOLT UPON TERMINATION OF THE NON-EXEMPT TRUST, (4) REMOVING AURELIE CAVALLARO AS A CO-TRUSTEE OF THE EXEMPT AND NON-EXEMPT TRUSTS, (5) PROHIBITING AURELIE CAVALLARO FROM USING EXEMPT AND NON-EXEMPT TRUST ASSETS TO PAY ATTORNEY'S FEES INCURRED IN HER INDIVIDUAL AND/OR BENEFICIARY CAPACITY, AND (6) FOR DAMAGES" WILL NOT VIOLATE THE NO-CONTEST CLAUSE OF THE TRUST

calendar.matters:
Application For Determination That Petition For Order (1) Instructing Co Trustees To Grant Access To Real Property To Beneficiary Alan W. Holt,
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jean Kohler for and with Alan Holt. Dov Grunschlag for Aurelie Cavallaro.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the non-exempt trust paying for the house, interpretation of the life estate, expenses, right to use the property and pro-rata distribution. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Application For Determination That Petition For Order (1) Instructing Co Trustees To Grant Access To Real Property To Beneficiary Alan W. Holt,
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Continued To Jul-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
